source.name: Lab 3.1: Defining a Slot in the Domain
source.instructions:
Pass all checks (see grader output). The script runs Check 0–7 like other labs:
0 — domain file exists
1 — valid YAML (top-level mapping)
2 — slots: section
3 — account slot (type: text)
4 — utter_ask_account with a text message
5–7 — actions: lists action_check_balance_simple, action_bank_hours, action_holiday_hours

Full score 10/10; output must include PASS for Codio.
source.guidance: The grader prints Check 0 through Check 7 the same way as Lab 4.1 (PASSED / FAILED / PARTIAL). Fix any failed check; Check 1 must pass (valid YAML) before the file can be graded fully. Full credit needs Score 10/10 and PASS in the output.
